name: HaloITSM
description: This plugin is used to create tickets on Incident > All incidents on the HaloITSM platform. It also supports updating tickets and syncing their status.

fields.label: Tenant Name
fields.description: The subdomain of your HaloITSM instance URL. For example, if your instance URL is 'https://mycompany.haloitsm.com', the Tenant Name is 'mycompany'. Navigate to Configuration > Integrations > HaloITSM API.

fields.label: Client ID
fields.description: The Client ID of the OAuth2 application registered in HaloITSM. Navigate to Configuration > Integrations > HaloITSM API > View Applications. Select the client ID based on the Authentication Method or create a new application and use that client ID.

fields.label: Authentication Method
fields.description: Select the OAuth2 grant type used to authenticate with HaloITSM. Choose 'Username and Password' to authenticate as a named agent user. Choose 'Client ID and Secret (Services)' for a service application configured under Configuration > Integrations > API Applications in HaloITSM.

fields.label: Client Secret
fields.description: Only required when Authentication Method is 'Client ID and Secret (Services)'. Navigate to Configuration > Integrations > HaloITSM API > View Applications. Select the application and copy the Client Secret.

fields.label: Username
fields.description: Only required when Authentication Method is 'Username and Password'. Navigate to Configuration > Teams & Agents > Agents. Click on the agent and check the Username on the Account Details page.

fields.label: Password
fields.description: Only required when Authentication Method is 'Username and Password'. The password for the HaloITSM agent account specified above.
